completed_tasks.name: Runtime Foundation executed and merged to main
Phase 3 plan-phase preflight reached no-context gate

remaining_tasks.name: Choose whether to continue Phase 3 planning without CONTEXT.md or run discuss-phase first
Create Phase 3 research, patterns, PLAN.md files, and plan verification artifacts

blockers.description: Phase 3 has no CONTEXT.md. gsd-plan-phase requires an explicit user choice before planning artifacts can be written.
blockers.workaround: Resume and answer either '1' to continue without context or '2' to run $gsd-discuss-phase 3 first.

blockers.description: gsd-sdk is not available in PATH in this environment.
blockers.workaround: Maintain GSD artifacts manually or restore gsd-sdk before using SDK-backed workflow commands.

human_actions_pending.context: The previous turn stopped at the no-CONTEXT.md gate for $gsd-plan-phase 3.

decisions.decision: Do not silently choose a no-context default for Phase 3 planning.
decisions.rationale: The gsd-plan-phase adapter explicitly forbids writing workflow artifacts before the user answers a required AskUserQuestion fallback.

decisions.decision: Create a Phase 3 handoff directory even though no Phase 3 plans exist yet.
decisions.rationale: The current paused work is specifically Phase 3 planning preflight.

next_action: Resume with $gsd-resume-work, then answer the Phase 3 context gate: 1 to continue without context, or 2 to run $gsd-discuss-phase 3 first.
context_notes: Phase 1 is complete and merged into main. Phase 2 remains pending. User attempted to execute Phase 3, then requested planning Phase 3. Planning halted before artifact creation because Phase 3 has no CONTEXT.md and request_user_input is unavailable in Default mode.
